title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 14–17, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I will not let you go... because I want the villagers to believe that I'm a liar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And the village stay as peaceful as always!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Might as well kill both of them!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You idiots! Just go attack the village!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Did you forget Captain Kuro's plan? We can't mess it up!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Or else he'll kill us all!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Do you hear me, you idiots!?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
